supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on third-party payment processors (Stripe, PayPal) for consumer payments and merchant/Dasher payouts. Dependence on AWS for cloud infrastructure hosting. Reliance on fleet companies in certain markets for delivery fulfillment.
supply_chain.risks: Concentration risk with limited payment processors. Single cloud provider dependency (AWS). Potential service interruptions from third-party vendors. Fleet company compliance and quality issues in certain markets.

regulatory_risks: Worker classification regulations - risk of Dashers being reclassified as employees under federal or state law
AB 5 in California and Proposition 22 legal challenges
EU Platform Work Directive requiring member states to transpose worker classification requirements
Minimum earnings standards for delivery workers in various jurisdictions (e.g., New York City)
Price control measures on local commerce platforms in certain jurisdictions
Merchant pricing and commission regulations
Consumer fee regulations and disclosure requirements
Sales tax, value-added tax, and indirect tax collection obligations
Digital services taxes in various jurisdictions
Food safety regulations for delivery of food products
Alcohol delivery regulations including licensing, age verification, and advertising restrictions
Pharmaceutical and controlled substance delivery regulations
Data privacy regulations including GDPR in EU and state privacy laws in US (e.g., CCPA)
Payment processing regulations including PSD II in Europe
Anti-money laundering compliance requirements in Europe
Background check regulations for Dashers
Antitrust and competition law scrutiny
FCPA and anti-corruption laws for international operations
Trade and economic sanctions (e.g., OFAC sanctions, EU sanctions)
Environmental sustainability disclosure requirements in EU

sanction_risks: Operations of Wolt subsidiary in jurisdictions in close proximity to Russia increase difficulty in complying with trade and economic sanction regimes related to business with Russia
Exposure to U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control sanctions and similar EU sanctions
Risk of operations in regions subject to geopolitical instability, conflict, or economic sanctions
